mapper.sql: id, entrustment_id, entrustment_no, entrust_company, sample_name, registration_time, registered_name, registered_userid, remark, crate_time, update_time

update test_billing_registration
entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
entrustment_no = #{entrustmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
entrust_company = #{entrustCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
